name: elephant-goldfish-codex
description: Codex-native elephant/goldfish workflow commands for design, implementation, and independent review

interface.shortDescription: Structured Codex workflows with fresh goldfish checks
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex slash commands for the elephant/goldfish pattern: brainstorm, PRD, bug fix, new feature, and pre-commit independent review. The working Codex session is the elephant; fresh Codex subagents are goldfish.
